seoTitle: Montumana vs Moonah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Montumana and Moonah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Montumana and Moonah.
heading: Montumana vs Moonah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Montumana, Tasmania and Moonah, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonah has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Montumana (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Montumana or Moonah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Montumana has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Moonah scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Montumana scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Moonah scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Montumana or Moonah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
